title: Status+
description: A server-side implementation of the status mod
body:
A fully server-side implementation of the [status mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/status). Feature complete, including a GUI selection menu!

Status+ allows you to specify three things:
1. Availability
    - Open to collaboration
    - Do not Disturb
2. Status
    - Are you streaming or recording?
3. Sleep
    - Whether you would like players to not skip the night

Your current "status" will show up as colored icons in the tab list next to your name. To change it, simply run the `/status` command!


Currently there is no integration with the official mod, so you will need to remove it from your client in order to not have duplicated icons with this mod installed on the server. Proper integration is potentially planned for a future release.
